item.title: MOTORING & ACCESSORIES | The perfect fit
item.description: A Mazda is never just a Mazda it’s a feeling. It’s a shot of anticipation just before you press start. It’s the feeling that you don’t just own a Mazda, you have a lifelong, irrevocable membership in the clubhouse of driving passion.
item.content:encoded:
A Mazda is never just a Mazda it’s a feeling. It’s a shot of anticipation just before you press start.

It’s the feeling that you don’t just own a Mazda, you have a lifelong, irrevocable membership in the clubhouse of driving passion.

For the designers at Mazda, achieving beauty is a rigorous practice in less being more. The Mazda CX-30 is no exception.

It is a mark of their dedication in this endeavor. Sweeping curves embrace and reflect the surrounding scenery-bringing the still to life. And giving you a subtle jolt of pride every time you approach it.

The driver and passengers are enveloped in an intimate and calm environment. The cabin is a study in prioritization and meticulous craftsmanship. A restorative space with well-appointed features that are in perfect alignment with the driver.

An interior that will transport you even before you press the accelerator. Inspiration is where you find it- where will the Mazda CX-30 take you on your journey?

Always keeping you connected- It’s all part of Mazda’s driver-centric philosophy. And why we place every control within your reach, so you can stay focused on the road ahead.

An intuitive instrument panel places gauges and display within your line of sight to minimize distraction.

And for an enhanced experience, the Mazda Connect Infotainment System features Apple CarPlay and Android auto integration

Sophisticated safety innovations that alert you to hazards and helps you avoid collisions or lesson their impact is the ingenious thinking behind i-Activsense.

This intelligent suite of available safety features such as Blind Spot Monitoring (BSM), Audible Cruise Confirmation with I-Stop function and Front & Rear Cross Traffic Alert (FRCTA) help improve your visibility and awareness of the road.

These are subtle adjustments and alerts that help create a confident experience behind the wheel.

Other features includes the 7 Inch touch screen which allows you to access climate control with ease, ensuring the comfort of everyone on board, 8 speakers placed throughout the cabin gets music and audio to a higher standard, the active driving display shows your current speed, some other features includes Parking sensor guidance for front and rear parking assistance, Driver Monitoring, Lane keep Assist System, Rear Window defogger and the 360° view monitor technology gives your eyes all around the vehicle, adding to the impressive safety technology.

Mazda CX-30 is available in front-wheel drive (FWD) and all-wheel drive (AWD) at Niranjans Mazda dealership in Suva, Nadi, Lautoka and Labasa.

Effortless Connectivity. Inset: Inset: Heighten your senses, We created a few of our own.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: MOTORING & ACCESSORIES | Appreciation for quality and style
item.description: ALTHOUGH sports cars have become less common because of their high cost, limited practicality, and expensive maintenance, they continue to attract car enthusiasts around the world. Many people dream of owning a sports car because it offers an exciting driving experience, impressive performance, and a sense of prestige.
item.content:encoded:
ALTHOUGH sports cars have become less common because of their high cost, limited practicality, and expensive maintenance, they continue to attract car enthusiasts around the world.

Many people dream of owning a sports car because it offers an exciting driving experience, impressive performance, and a sense of prestige.

Beyond transportation, sports cars represent passion, innovation, and luxury.

One of the greatest advantages of a sports car is its speed and lightweight design. Unlike SUVs or family sedans, sports cars are built for performance.

Their lightweight construction allows them to accelerate quickly while maintaining excellent handling and stability.

Despite focusing on speed, many sports cars are also engineered with durable components that ensure reliability.

Another benefit is their high-performance engines. Sports cars are designed to operate at higher engine revolutions, producing more power and faster acceleration.

Advanced engine management systems and carefully tuned transmissions help deliver instant throttle response.

As a result, drivers experience rapid acceleration and thrilling performance that ordinary cars cannot easily match.

Sports cars are also admired for their stunning appearance.

Their sleek body shapes, aerodynamic styling, and distinctive designs make them stand out on the road.

Iconic models such as the Lamborghini Diablo have become symbols of automotive beauty and engineering excellence.

Owning such a vehicle often attracts attention and reflects the owner’s appreciation for quality and style. The driving experience is another reason why sports cars remain popular.

From the precise steering to the responsive handling, every journey feels exciting.

The powerful engine combined with a specially designed exhaust system creates a unique engine note that many enthusiasts describe as an “engine symphony.”

This distinctive sound adds to the excitement of every drive.

Many sports cars also feature manual transmissions, giving drivers greater control and a stronger connection with the vehicle. Although automatic transmissions have become increasingly common, manual gearboxes continue to be valued by driving enthusiasts who enjoy the challenge and engagement they provide.

Sports cars are often equipped with the latest automotive technology, including advanced suspension systems, high-performance brakes, lightweight materials, and innovative safety features. These technologies improve both performance and driving confidence. Finally, some sports cars can become valuable collector’s items.

Unlike many ordinary vehicles that depreciate quickly, certain sports cars maintain or even increase their value over time, making them attractive investments for collectors. In conclusion, sports cars are more than just fast vehicles. They combine speed, beauty, advanced technology, and an unforgettable driving experience.

While they may not be the most practical choice for everyday use, they continue to inspire admiration and remain a dream for many automobile enthusiasts around the world.

Left: Well-known car collector Luc Poirier’s lineup of Ferraris. Picture: guideautoweb.com

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: MOTORING & ACCESSORIES | For Timasi, his wife and children motivate him
item.description: FOR 34-year-old Timasi Vuadreu, every sunrise marks the beginning of another day of hard work, determination and sacrifice. Behind the wheel of his taxi, navigating the busy streets of Suva, he is driven by one purpose to provide a better life for his family.
item.content:encoded:
FOR 34-year-old Timasi Vuadreu, every sunrise marks the beginning of another day of hard work, determination and sacrifice.

Behind the wheel of his taxi, navigating the busy streets of Suva, he is driven by one purpose to provide a better life for his family.

Originally from Kadavu and now residing in Lami Village, Timasi has spent the past 10 years working as a taxi driver along the Suva–Lami corridor.

After years of operating from Lami Town, he recently joined Black Arrow Taxi and Tours in Suva City, where he has been based for the last three months.

His day begins long before most people are awake.

“I start work around 4 or 4:30 every morning and usually finish at about 10 at night,” he says.

“It’s a long day, but when you have a family depending on you, the hustle always comes first.

Timasi is a proud husband and father of two.

Supporting his wife and children is what motivates him to keep going, even on the longest and most challenging days.

“Life is not easy these days,” he explains. “The cost of living keeps going up, fuel prices continue to rise, and everything is becoming more expensive. Like everyone else, we’re feeling the pressure, but we have to keep working and do our best.”

While many see taxis as simply a way to get from one place to another, for drivers like Timasi, every journey comes with its own challenges.

“Driving in the city isn’t always easy, one of the biggest issues we face is passengers who leave without paying, especially during the night.

“That’s why we always have to stay alert and be careful while we’re working.”

Despite those challenges, Timasi says the job has also given him something valuable lasting relationships with the people he serves.

“After driving for so many years, you build trust with your customers. I have regular passengers who call me whenever they need a ride. Some have become like friends. T

Those bookings help keep me busy, and I’m grateful for their support.

The rising cost of fuel remains one of the biggest concerns for taxi operators across the country, but Timasi believes there is little choice except to keep moving forward.

“We can’t control fuel prices, all we can do is hope things improve and continue working because our families depend on us.

For Timasi, being a taxi driver is much more than a profession it’s a commitment to serving others while providing for those he loves.

“The life of a taxi driver is always busy. At any time, you can receive a call for a job, and you have to be ready.

“This work isn’t for everyone. You need patience, passion, and a strong work ethic.”

Looking back, Timasi says becoming a taxi driver was always his dream.

“When I was younger, I wanted to become a taxi driver. Over the last 10 years, I’ve experienced many ups and downs, but I don’t regret it.

This job has looked after my family, and that’s something I’m proud of.” As someone who has built a career behind the wheel, Timasi also has a message for young people searching for direction.

“Not everyone succeeds in academics, and that’s okay,” he says.

“If driving is something you’re interested in, get your licence, work hard, and be responsible.

This job has provided for my family, and it can also provide for yours.”

As Suva wakes each morning, thousands of people rely on taxi drivers to get them safely to work, school, appointments, and home again.

For Timasi Vuadreu, every trip is more than just another fare it is another opportunity to put food on the table, support his children, and prove that honest work, determination, and perseverance can take a family a long way.

For Timasi Vuadreu, every trip is more than just another fare it is another opportunity to put food on the table. Picture: JOHN CHETTY

item.title: PROPERTY GUIDE | Windows that wow
item.description: Creative window ideas can transform a home remodel by adding natural light, improving views, and enhancing architectural style. Popular options include picture windows, bay and bow windows, specialty shapes, and floor–to–ceiling designs that make rooms feel larger and brighter. New windows can transform your home. Windows can invite more natural light into your home, making it feel warmer and room
item.content:encoded:
Creative window ideas can transform a home remodel by adding natural light, improving views, and enhancing architectural style. Popular options include picture windows, bay and bow windows, specialty shapes, and floor–to–ceiling designs that make rooms feel larger and brighter.

New windows can transform your home. Windows can invite more natural light into your home, making it feel warmer and roomier. Consider these window ideas to enhance your home.

Bring cozy seating with a bay window in your living room

Bay windows bring big, beautiful views and they also set up a sun-soaked spot to curl up with a book. With bay window design ideas, you can consider double hung or casement windows along with design elements, like window grilles. Adding a bay window as part of a home remodel will transform any room. You can fill the space with large pillows to make it extra cozy, or add shelving for plants or books.

Brighten your kitchen with a window backsplash

Kitchen window backsplashes have emerged as a home trend in contemporary homes because of the unique look it creates. A kitchen window backsplash introduces more daylight into the space while providing a greater connection to outdoor views. You can use slider windows for wide areas to add big views above the sink. Slider windows are great to create a pass-through window to expand your indoor-outdoor living.

Let light shine with windows on your staircase

If adding more natural light lands on your home remodel list of goals, think about adding windows to your staircase areas. It’s an underused space where added sunlight can help make your home feel roomier. Windows on your staircase allow you to create a floor-to-ceiling window look if you have the space available.

Transform your space with unique window shapes

Special shape windows come in unique window shapes to fit high on ceilings. If you have angled ceilings, a triangle window can fit perfect for extra natural light. Some home remodels will include a combination of picture windows to expand views. Round top windows placed above a row of windows help break up the straight lines. Arched windows fit in a variety of spaces because they come in several shapes.

Upgrade your sliding glass door with a beautiful window

Some home remodels will replace a sliding glass door with windows. If you already have multiple patio doors, adding windows can help expand a patio space so you can include more seating.

Add a fresh touch with a shower window for natural light

If you’re considering bathroom windows as part of your home remodel you can think about shower windows. Shower windows add sunlight to help you start your day. Bathroom windows help with ventilation, too. When thinking about bathroom window ideas, you can use decorative glass options to obscure views and continue to soak up daylight.

Bay windows bring big, beautiful views and they also set up a sun-soaked spot to curl up with a book. Picture: WWW.INFINITYWINDOWS.COM

Special shape windows come in unique window shapes to fit high on ceilings. Picture: WWW.INFINITYWINDOWS.COM

Creative window ideas can transform a home remodel by adding natural light, improving views, and enhancing architectural style. Picture: WWW.INFINITYWINDOWS.COM

If you already have multiple patio doors, adding windows can help expand a patio space so you can include more seating. Picture: WWW.INFINITYWINDOWS.COM

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: TIMES SHOPPER | Helps with your beauty sleep | Sleep in quality, wake in confidence with Courts overseas beds
item.description: A good night’s sleep is the foundation of a healthier, happier life, and it all begins with the right bed. We understand that comfort is more than just a luxury it’s a necessity.
item.content:encoded:
A good night’s sleep is the foundation of a healthier, happier life, and it all begins with the right bed.

We understand that comfort is more than just a luxury it’s a necessity.

Whether you’re furnishing a new home, upgrading your bedroom, or creating a welcoming space for guests, Overseas Beds offers the perfect combination of quality, comfort, durability, and style to transform the way you sleep.

Crafted using premium-quality materials and designed with precision, every Overseas Bed is built to provide exceptional support and long-lasting performance.

Our commitment to quality ensures that each bed delivers the comfort you deserve, night after night, helping you wake up feeling refreshed, energized, and ready to take on the day. Why Choose Overseas Bed?

Superior Craftsmanship: Every Overseas Bed is manufactured using high-grade materials that are carefully selected for strength, durability, and lasting comfort. Built to withstand daily use, our beds are designed to remain supportive and reliable for years to come.

Exceptional Comfort: Designed with ergonomic principles in mind, Overseas Beds provide balanced body support that helps reduce pressure points and promotes proper sleeping posture. Whether you’re a side, back, or stomach sleeper, you’ll enjoy a more restful and uninterrupted night’s sleep.

Modern & Elegant Designs: Your bedroom should be a place of relaxation and style.

Overseas Bed offers a wide range of contemporary and timeless designs that effortlessly complement any bedroom décor. From minimalist aesthetics to classic finishes, there’s a bed to suit every taste and lifestyle.

Affordable Luxury: Premium comfort doesn’t have to come with a premium price tag.

Overseas Bed delivers exceptional value by combining superior quality with competitive pricing, making luxurious sleep accessible for every household. Easy Maintenance: Designed for everyday living,

Overseas Beds are easy to clean and maintain, allowing you to keep your bedroom looking fresh and inviting with minimal effort.

Perfect for homes, apartments, hotels, guest houses, and rental properties, Overseas Bed is trusted for its quality, reliability, and outstanding comfort. Whether you’re purchasing your first bed or upgrading to a better sleep experience, you can rest assured that you’re investing in furniture designed to enhance your everyday life.

Don’t settle for restless nights or uncomfortable sleep. Experience the difference that premium craftsmanship and thoughtful design can make.

Visit your nearest Courts store today and discover the complete range of Overseas Beds. Sleep Better. Live Better. Choose Overseas Bed Smart Credit Options

With some of the best credit deals in town, Courts makes it easy for families across Fiji to bring home quality furniture without stretching their budgets.

Flexible payment options allow more households to enjoy premium comfort and modern living while paying at a pace that suits them.

Visit your nearest Courts showroom today to explore the latest range of Overseas Beds.

Discover exceptional value, modern designs, and quality craftsmanship that will help transform your bedroom into what you’ve always wanted.

Stay connected with Courts by scanning the QR code for the latest promotions, OB and Red Pen Deal locations, and exclusive offers. You can also download the myCourts App to browse featured products, access your account, receive customer support, and stay up to date with the latest deals all from your mobile device.

Designed for everyday living, Overseas Beds are easy to clean and maintain, all available at Courts.

Sleep in quality with overseas beds at Courts.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: TIMES SHOPPER | A mother’s journey to health, freedom, and purpose
item.description: At 41, Lite Daunika from Naluwai in Naitasiri is redefining what it means to be a modern Fijian mother. A stay-at-home mum of four, two teenagers in high school and two younger children in primary, her story is one that people can relate to filled with, quite determination, adaption and resilience. “I’ve been working most of my life,” she explains. “From a young age, I went straight into full-time
item.content:encoded:
At 41, Lite Daunika from Naluwai in Naitasiri is redefining what it means to be a modern Fijian mother. A stay-at-home mum of four, two teenagers in high school and two younger children in primary, her story is one that people can relate to filled with, quite determination, adaption and resilience.

“I’ve been working most of my life,” she explains. “From a young age, I went straight into full-time work, and for years it felt like I was just living from paycheque to paycheque.”

That cycle eventually pushed her to look overseas for better opportunities. Yet even after spending time abroad, the financial breakthrough she had hoped for did not materialise.

Everything changed when she discovered an online side hustle.

“I found something that allowed me to work from my phone, and it gave me the chance to come back home and still earn. That was my ticket back to my children.”Today, Lite runs her own online business as a high-ticket affiliate marketer. More importantly, she has reclaimed something she once missed, time with her family.

“It’s a real blessing, to be there when my kids leave for school and to pick them up afterward. That feeling is priceless.”

But beyond financial independence, Lite has embraced another role: what could be called a “shopper angel” within her household. Her approach to shopping and food is intentional, rooted in health and cultural values.

“When I was overseas, fast food was everywhere, it was convenient, but the nutrition just wasn’t there. Coming back home changed my mindset completely.”

Now, her weekly shopping routine revolves around fresh produce. Every Friday, she visits the local market with her children in tow.

“The market is my favourite place, I always start with vegetables, whatever I can afford and then I buy the extras from the supermarket.”

Her weekly grocery budget has risen from around $150 to $200–$250, reflecting the increasing cost of living. Still, she prioritises quality over convenience.

“You are what you eat, so if I want my children to do well in school and stay healthy, I have to make sure they’re eating properly.”

Her meals often include local staples such as root crops and leafy greens, complemented by simple additions like tuna for flavour. She also prepares fresh juices in the mornings and ensures her children carry balanced lunches to school every day.

“I always include a fruit or vegetable, even something small like carrots or cucumber makes a difference.”

Lite draws inspiration from other mothers as well.

“I follow a lady online who packs colourful, healthy lunchboxes for her kids, it really motivates me to do better.”

Health in her household goes beyond food. Herbal drinks, often prepared by her mother, play a regular role.

“Even when we’re not sick, we drink them, this helps in keeping our immune system strong.”

Looking ahead, she hopes to instil self-sufficiency in her children by encouraging them to plant their own food.

“We have land, so why not use it. “I want my children to understand the value of growing what we eat.”

Her advice to other mothers is simple and powerful.

“Start small. Add some fruit, add a vegetable. Drink more water. Look after yourself first because if you’re not well, everything else suffers.”

In Lite’s world, shopping is no longer just a routine task. It is an act of care, a strategy for wellbeing, and a foundation for a better future.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: TIMES SHOPPER | Living life the healthy way
item.description: AT 41, Lite Daunika of Naluwai, Naitasiri, is showing that success isn’t just measured by income, it’s measured by the life you build for your family. Once trapped in the cycle of living from paycheque to paycheque and searching overseas for better opportunities, the mother of four found an online business that brought her home while allowing her to earn an income.
item.content:encoded:
AT 41, Lite Daunika of Naluwai, Naitasiri, is showing that success isn’t just measured by income, it’s measured by the life you build for your family.

Once trapped in the cycle of living from paycheque to paycheque and searching overseas for better opportunities, the mother of four found an online business that brought her home while allowing her to earn an income.

Today, she is not only a successful digital entrepreneur but also a passionate advocate for healthy, affordable family living.

From choosing fresh market produce over processed food to teaching her children the value of growing their own crops, Lite’s journey is one of resilience, reinvention and purpose.

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.

item.title: TIMES SHOPPER | More than just a cleaning product
item.description: FOR over 95 years, Domestos has been at the forefront of home hygiene, becoming a trusted household name and building on their purpose to ensure that clean and safe toilets ae a reality for everyone. Domestos flagship product, Domestos thick bleach, ensures it kills germs in hard-to-reach places, delivering an impressive cleaning performance while also being 100% biodegradable.
item.content:encoded:
FOR over 95 years, Domestos has been at the forefront of home hygiene, becoming a trusted household name and building on their purpose to ensure that clean and safe toilets ae a reality for everyone.

Domestos flagship product, Domestos thick bleach, ensures it kills germs in hard-to-reach places, delivering an impressive cleaning performance while also being 100% biodegradable.

By harnessing the power of what they do, the Domestos UNICEF partnership has helped over 29 million people gain access to cleaner and safer toilets, with the set goal of helping 100 million people.

Domestos has partnered with governments, NGO’s and development organizations to make school toilets cleaner and safer in countries such as Turkey, Vietnam, the Philippines and South Africa.

Domestos bleach represents itself as more than just a cleaning product. It is a symbol of trust, innovation and social responsibility.

In an era where hygiene has become a cornerstone of public health, Domestos continues to stand out for its efficacy, consumer trust, and purpose driven initiatives.

A product of Unilever, Domestos Bleach is distributed in Fiji by Motibhai Group, Sharing quality, sharing happiness.

Domestos Bleach is distributed in Fiji by the Motibhai Group. Pictures: Motibhai

© 2026 FijiTimes. All rights reserved.
